title: stelis maduroi
intro: Stelis maduroi, also known as the yellow orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to Venezuela. It is a terrestrial orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Stelis maduroi has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high content of alkaloids, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The plant's extracts have been used to prepare herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which are believed to have several health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, as well as being used to treat conditions such as fever and respiratory issues.
